trade_lessons.rule: G-01: MELT-UP REGIME & RSI DECOUPLING (ENH_86) - SPY RSI > 75 no longer blocks high-beta accumulation if VIX < 20.
G-02: VWAP STOP & LIQUIDITY WASH (ENH_87) - Strictly trail intraday VWAP for runners; a VWAP PIN during SHORT_GAMMA is an accumulation floor.
G-03: POWER HOUR INTEGRITY - rVol > 2.0 at 15:30 validates Institutional Graduation; execute via Precision-Bid Pivots.
G-04: TICKER TACTICAL ANCHORS - Numerical dates, floors, and modifiers moved to portfolio context for token economy.
G-05: NORDEA ESA DEFENSE (ENH_58) - Zero-tax friction authorizes aggressive overnight gap-scalping on high-momentum scout targets.

G-06: WAC FALLACY & BINARY DERISKING - Never prioritize Weighted Average Cost (WAC) preservation if an intraday spread mathematically clears the GLOBAL_ALPHA_FRICTION_HURDLE. Furthermore, mandate a minimum 30% defensive scale-out on extended (+10% VWAP) positions prior to unverified binary catalysts (e.g., Q1 Earnings) if forensic audits identify a 'GAAP Mirage' or heavy impending CapEx burn.
